calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendment, Will And Designation Of Beneficiary; For Redress For Interference To Inherit; For Damages
Off Calendar Mar-10-2021 Off Calendar

Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement And Mutual Release
Off Calendar Mar-01-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Rueppel appeared by zoom for Ann Gieseker (Attorney-in-fact for Bridget O'Boyle).
Deidre Von Rock appeared by telephone for Tom O'Boyle and Manya Day.

Ms. Rock stated that she has no objection to the petition. The Court stated that it has no issue with the 664.6 reservation. Mr. Rueppel and Ms. Rock stated that they have nothing to add. The Petition for Approval of Settlement Agreement and Mutual Release is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
